sections.summary: Computer Science graduate with hands-on experience in software development, production troubleshooting, SQL analysis, and cloud-based systems. Experienced in building backend applications with Python and FastAPI, investigating complex technical issues through log analysis and network diagnostics, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable solutions. Passionate about software engineering, system monitoring, and cybersecurity technologies.
sections.experience: Technical Support Specialist | Comax Smart ERP | 2025 – Present • Troubleshoot and resolve production issues in a large-scale ERP platform using SQL queries, log analysis, and network diagnostics. • Investigate application failures, database inconsistencies, and system performance issues to identify root causes and implement effective solutions. • Analyze application logs, database records, and system behavior to diagnose complex technical incidents. • Collaborate with developers, QA engineers, and implementation teams to reproduce, investigate, and resolve software defects. • Validate bug fixes and system changes through functional testing before deployment to production environments. • Monitor business-critical processes and ensure system availability while maintaining high service standards. • Create technical documentation, troubleshooting guides, and knowledge base articles to improve issue resolution efficiency. Python Programming Tutor | Tel Hai University | Jul 2022 – Jul 2023 Delivered weekly tutoring sessions covering algorithms, data structures, problem solving, and Python debugging for Computer Science students.
sections.education: B.Sc. Computer Science – Tel Hai University (Mar 2022 – Aug 2025) Specialization: Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Large Language Models (LLMs), Generative AI.
sections.projects: ['Capstone Project Lead – Tribe Platform: Designed backend architecture using FastAPI, SQLAlchemy and PostgreSQL. Implemented CRUD services, validation logic and relational data models. Built WebSocket-based real-time activity updates and participation tracking. Integrated Generative AI for automatic event image generation. Deployed cloud infrastructure using AWS and implemented automated integration testing with pytest.', 'Server Monitor System: Developed a server monitoring platform for tracking service availability and system health. Built RESTful APIs using FastAPI and PostgreSQL for monitoring data management. Implemented concurrent HTTP, FTP and SSH health checks using ThreadPoolExecutor. Designed monitoring history and incident-tracking data models for proactive issue detection.']

projects: Capstone Project Lead – Tribe Platform: Designed backend architecture using FastAPI, SQLAlchemy and PostgreSQL. Implemented CRUD services, validation logic and relational data models. Built WebSocket-based real-time activity updates and participation tracking. Integrated Generative AI for automatic event image generation. Deployed cloud infrastructure using AWS and implemented automated integration testing with pytest.

Server Monitor System: Developed a server monitoring platform for tracking service availability and system health. Built RESTful APIs using FastAPI and PostgreSQL for monitoring data management. Implemented concurrent HTTP, FTP and SSH health checks using ThreadPoolExecutor. Designed monitoring history and incident-tracking data models for proactive issue detection.

ai_insights.professional_summary: בוגר מדעי המחשב עם ניסיון מעשי בפיתוח תוכנה, פתרון בעיות בייצור, ניתוח SQL ומערכות מבוססות ענן. בעל ניסיון בבניית יישומים בצד השרת עם Python ו-FastAPI, חקירת בעיות טכניות מורכבות באמצעות ניתוח יומנים ואבחון רשת.
ai_insights.career_trajectory: Gal is on a trajectory towards a career in software development, with a focus on backend systems and cloud technologies. His experience in technical support also positions him well for roles that require troubleshooting and system monitoring.
improvement_suggestions: Add quantifiable achievements to experience descriptions.
Include any relevant certifications or training.
Consider adding a personal portfolio link showcasing projects.
Highlight specific technologies used in projects more prominently.
Tailor the resume for specific job applications to emphasize relevant skills.

raw_text:
Gal Lifshitz | Israel | 052-352-7293 | gal.lifshiz123@gmail.com | GitHub | LinkedIn
Summary
Computer Science graduate with hands-on experience in software development, production
troubleshooting, SQL analysis, and cloud-based systems. Experienced in building backend
applications with Python and FastAPI, investigating complex technical issues through log analysis
and network diagnostics, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable solutions.
Passionate about software engineering, system monitoring, and cybersecurity technologies.
Technical Skills
Frontend: React, React Native, Angular, HTML, CSS
Backend: FastAPI, Node.js, Laravel, REST APIs, WebSockets
Databases: PostgreSQL, SQL, MongoDB, Firebase, SQLite
Networking: TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP/HTTPS, FTP, SSH, Network Troubleshooting
Cloud & Tools: AWS (EC2, RDS, S3), Git, CI/CD, SQLAlchemy, Expo, Generative AI
Experience
Technical Support Specialist | Comax Smart ERP | 2025 – Present
• Troubleshoot and resolve production issues in a large-scale ERP platform using SQL queries, log
analysis, and network diagnostics.
• Investigate application failures, database inconsistencies, and system performance issues to
identify root causes and implement effective solutions.
• Analyze application logs, database records, and system behavior to diagnose complex technical
incidents.
• Collaborate with developers, QA engineers, and implementation teams to reproduce, investigate,
and resolve software defects.
• Validate bug fixes and system changes through functional testing before deployment to production
environments.
• Monitor business-critical processes and ensure system availability while maintaining high service
standards.
• Create technical documentation, troubleshooting guides, and knowledge base articles to improve
issue resolution efficiency.
Python Programming Tutor | Tel Hai University | Jul 2022 – Jul 2023
Delivered weekly tutoring sessions covering algorithms, data structures, problem solving, and
Python debugging for Computer Science students.
Projects
Capstone Project Lead – Tribe Platform
• Designed backend architecture using FastAPI, SQLAlchemy and PostgreSQL.
• Implemented CRUD services, validation logic and relational data models.
• Built WebSocket-based real-time activity updates and participation tracking.
• Integrated Generative AI for automatic event image generation.
• Deployed cloud infrastructure using AWS and implemented automated integration testing with
pytest.
Server Monitor System
• Developed a server monitoring platform for tracking service availability and system health.
• Built RESTful APIs using FastAPI and PostgreSQL for monitoring data management.
• Implemented concurrent HTTP, FTP and SSH health checks using ThreadPoolExecutor.
• Designed monitoring history and incident-tracking data models for proactive issue detection.
Education
B.Sc. Computer Science – Tel Hai University (Mar 2022 – Aug 2025)
Specialization: Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Large Language Models (LLMs),
Generative AI.
